description:
Letter. Business letter from Yisrael b. Natan, addressed to Nahray b. Nissim, in Fusṭāṭ, sent from al-Gūsh (Jīsh, al-Jashsh, Gush Halab). Arabic script on verso. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card). [NB volume number in shelfmark is roman numeral I, not Arabic numeral 1]. Alternate shelfmark: ENA 76.1

He writes that while in Damascus, he plans to copy the Order Qodashim from the Iraqi Talmud, and also mentions a notebook (daftar) belonging to the head of the yeshiva, possibly a collection of responsa. (Information from Gil, Palestine, Vol 1: 233)
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic מ-Gush Ḥalav לפוסטאט. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
